info.title: Academic Journal API
info.description:
REST API for the academic journal management system: submissions, peer review, editorial workflow, and publications.

**Authentication:** Protected routes use Laravel Sanctum in **stateful** mode (session cookie `laravel_session`). **`Authorization: Bearer` tokens are not used** by this backend.

**CSRF cookie:** Laravel also exposes `GET /sanctum/csrf-cookie` (no `api` prefix). This project additionally aliases **`GET /api/v1/sanctum/csrf-cookie`** so a SPA can use the same API base as other calls. Then `POST /api/v1/auth/login` with cookies, and send header `X-XSRF-TOKEN` (must match the `XSRF-TOKEN` cookie) on unsafe requests.

**Errors:** Validation → **422** (`message`, `errors`). Unauthenticated → **401** (message: Unauthenticated.). Forbidden → **403** (message: Access denied.) or role middleware (message: Access denied for this role.). Auth endpoints may return **429** when throttled.

get.description: List articles based on the user's role.

200.description: Paginated ArticleResource collection (`data.data` items match ArticleResource)

403.description: Cannot list articles for this account

post.summary: Submit a new article (with PDF upload)
post.description: Create an article and its initial version (v1) with secure PDF upload.

get.description: Show article details.

200.description: ArticleResource (relations loaded internally for status_history only; response matches ArticleResource::toArray)

404.description: Implicit route model binding when invalid id

get.summary: Download the current PDF version of an article
get.description: Download the PDF of the current version of an article.

404.description: No current version or PDF missing on disk

201.description: Publication model persisted + article status becomes published

get.summary: List all versions of an article
get.description: List the version history of an article.

200.description: Rows from `article_versions` query builder (includes storage path)

post.summary: Upload a new PDF version for an article
post.description: Add a new PDF version to an article (re-submission).

get.summary: Download a specific PDF version of an article
get.description: Download a specific version of an article.

201.description: Account created; user receives the selected role (`author` or `reader`)

post.summary: Login and receive a session cookie

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile.

password_confirmation.description: Must match password when password is set

post.summary: Send a password reset link to the given email

200.description: Always 200 (does not reveal whether the email exists)

message.example: If the account exists, a reset link has been sent.

post.summary: Reset the user's password using a reset token

get.description: List categories.

200.description: Counters grouped by workflow section (shape varies by primary role)

get.summary: Get latest finale decision + history for an article
get.description: Show the latest decision and history for an article.

200.description: latest/latest_final mirror finale row; history filtered to finale stage

403.description: Author not owner or not staff

post.summary: Record or update the final editorial decision (editor only)
post.description: Record an editorial decision and update the article status.

comments.example: Minor edits requested previously; now accepted.

get.summary: List notifications for the authenticated user
get.description: List notifications for the authenticated user.

200.description: Paginated NotificationResource inside nested `data` (20 per page)

post.summary: Mark all unread notifications as read
post.description: Mark all unread notifications as read.

get.description: Return the number of unread notifications.

200.description: Duplicates count under `data` and root for backward compatibility

get.summary: List all published articles (public, no auth)
get.description: Public list of published articles with filters and search.

200.description: LengthAwarePaginator JSON nested under `data` (12 per page); rows are joined article/category/publication fields

get.description: Public detail of a publication.
Public download of the published PDF.
Return distinct volumes/issues available for filtering.

get.summary: Get the review for a given assignment
get.description: Show the review for an assignment.

post.summary: Submit or save a draft review for an assignment (reviewer)
post.description: Submit a review for an accepted assignment.

200.description: Existing review updated (draft resave or second submit blocked upstream)

get.summary: List submitted reviews for an article (editor/admin)
get.description: List reviews for an article (editor/admin).

get.summary: Search for available reviewers by email (editor/admin)
get.description: Search reviewers by email to populate the assignment autocomplete.
List assignments for an article.

200.description: Eloquent models with reviewer + assignedBy loaded

data.description: ReviewerAssignment models with `reviewer` and `assignedBy` eager-loaded (JSON keys follow Laravel model serialization)

post.description: Create reviewer assignments for an article.

get.description: Show assignment details for the assigned reviewer or editorial staff.

200.description: Assignment with reviewer, assignedBy, article summary

patch.summary: Accept or decline a reviewer assignment (reviewer)
patch.description: The reviewer accepts or declines their assignment.

get.summary: List all users with optional search/filter (admin only)
get.description: List users (admin), with simple search filter.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Substring match on name or email

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: One of id, name, email, created_at

200.description: Paginated UserResource inside `data` (see Article index pattern)

post.summary: Create a new user and assign a role (admin only)
post.description: Create a user and assign their primary role.

role.description: Must exist in `roles.name` (e.g. admin, editor, reviewer, author, reader)

get.summary: Get user details (admin or same user)
get.description: Show user details.

put.summary: Update user information (admin or own profile)

post.summary: Assign a role to a user (admin only)
post.description: Assign a primary role to a user.

get.description: Delegates to Laravel Sanctum's cookie endpoint. Call this (or `GET /sanctum/csrf-cookie` at the app root) before logging in when using cookie + `X-XSRF-TOKEN` authentication.

204.description: No body; sets `XSRF-TOKEN` cookie (and session cookie when applicable)

message.example: Only accepted articles can be published.

sanctum.description: Session cookie issued after successful `POST /auth/login`. Send `X-XSRF-TOKEN` header on POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE. Cookie-based Sanctum only (no Authorization Bearer in this codebase).
sanctum.name: laravel_session
